display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AGGREGATE THROUGHPUT
~12x per-user · ~45x measured aggregate
~90x roofline vs naive serial

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CROSS-AGENT KV at scale
scoped, correctness-gated invalidation

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KV REUSE turns on
shared prefix (sys prompt / tools / RAG)
prefilled once, not N times

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BATCHED-DECODE crossover
weight byte-stream amortised across users
(decode is bandwidth-bound at B=1)

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SAFETY gate ON
100% vs 50% safe (tau-bench airline)
enforced by kernel, not model

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TURN-TAX delete
kernel removes the error/retry model turn
the harness otherwise pays

div.style: color: rgb(90, 74, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Parity is table-stakes (removes 'it's slower'); the LIFT is the fleet economics above.
Proven: forward pass bit-identical vs HF · KV eviction logit-exact · every headline survived a 4-skeptic pass.
Honest ceiling: DETECTION is ~100% evadable — durable guarantees are the ENFORCEMENT layers (IFC / plan-CFI / witness), not the detector.
